heading: Conversion of certain positions in Department of Agriculture
label: 4155 Conversion of certain positions in Department of Agriculture
notes: CodificationIn subsec. (a), “” substituted for “the effective date of this Act” pursuant to , set out as an Effective Date note under .February 15, 1981section 2403 of Pub. L. 96–465section 3901 of this title

children.heading: Designation and classification of positions to be occupied; notice
children.label: a Designation and classification of positions to be occupied; notice

children.text: designate and classify under those positions in the Foreign Agricultural Service under the General Schedule described in which the Secretary of Agriculture determines are to be occupied by career members of the Foreign Service, andsection 3981 of this titlesection 5332 of title 5
provide written notice to individuals holding those positions of such designation and classification of the personnel category under which will apply to such individual.section 3903 of this title
to accept conversion to the Foreign Service, in which case such employee shall be converted in accordance with the provisions of subsection (c); or
to decline conversion to the Foreign Service and have the provisions of subsection (d) apply.

The Secretary of Agriculture shall recommend to the President for appointment to the appropriate class (as determined under paragraph (2)), by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, those employees who elect conversion under subsection (a)(1).
The Secretary of Agriculture shall appoint as Foreign Service personnel those employees who elect to accept conversion and who are not eligible for appointment under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Results of declining to convert
children.label: d Results of declining to convert
children.text: Any employee who declines conversion under subsection (b)(2) shall for so long as that employee continues to hold the designated position be deemed to be a member of the Foreign Service for purposes of allowances, differentials, and similar benefits (as determined by the Secretary of Agriculture).
